title: Now Showing: Chris Kohler’s Three-Minute Guide to the 2026 Federal Budget; From Cocaine To Gold: The Cartels’ New Billion-Dollar Trade; What Channel Seven didn’t tell you about their renewable energy exposé
description: Take a few moments to enjoy Jeweller's Friday Flicks video selection, including updates on current affairs and insights into the jewellery trade. This week, get Chris Kohler’s three-minute guide to the 2026 Federal Budget, uncover how cartels are shifting from cocaine to gold, and explore what Channel Seven left out of its renewable energy exposé.
